g.text: Ollama → hypothetical passage → embed → vector search
vector + lexical (+ graph) · Reciprocal Rank Fusion · MMR
same retrieval.search path · never drifts from production
synthetic or gold cases · baseline compare · CI gate
pocket update --graph · POCKET_GRAPH=1 · same Δ lineage/memo sweep · pocket graph "entity"
extractor: deterministic (offline) | ollama | airllm · entities + relations tables · augments RRF
list_concepts MCP tool · POCKET_GRAPH_MIN_CONFIDENCE=0.0 · HITL review gate
⚡ Schema-constrained JSON extraction · Ollama ≥ 0.3.0 format:{schema} · grammar-constrained decoding · zero retry overhead
